name: release-follow-up
title: Release Follow-up
summary: Watch release checks to a terminal state and prepare bounded remediation when external evidence requires action.

schedule.rationale: Follow an in-flight release until external checks settle.

evidence.name: release-gates
evidence.description: Build, publish, rollout, smoke, and rollback status from authoritative systems.

expected_artifacts.name: release-report
expected_artifacts.description: Release timeline, remediation, verification, and unresolved risks.

expected_artifacts.name: run-journal
expected_artifacts.description: Durable execution and effect audit trail.

safety.rationale: The agent can prepare remediation but cannot publish, promote, or roll back without approval.
safety.secrets: Status responses and reports must omit release credentials and secret values.
